productDisplayName: Puma Men Knitted Chocolate Brown Sweaters
description: Composition Brown knit sweater made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed V-neck that has an orange stripe, full sleeves with ribbed cuffs that have orange detailing, two thick orange bands on left sleeve above the elbow, embroidered and coloured branding on left chest and has a ribbed hem with orange detailing Fitting Regular Wash care Machine was cold Wash separately Do not use softeners, bleach, iron or dry clean Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Line dry Flaunt your love for simplicity and minimalism with this knit sweater from puma. The full sleeves and pure cotton fabric are sure to keep the winter chill at bay. Team this with jeans and casual shoes for a cool, casual look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
